title: Miracle in Cell No. 7
posterAlt: Miracle in Cell No. 7 (2013) movie poster
tmdbOverview: A story about a mentally ill man wrongfully imprisoned for murder and his relationship with his 6 year old daughter.
synopsis: Released in 2013, Miracle in Cell No. 7 is a drama, comedy and k-drama film from South Korea. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.1 on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a G certification (JP rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
